arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer update: Ruben Amorim's Marcus Rashford replacement likely to leave in January window
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer target Randal Kolo Muani is reportedly very likely to leave Paris Saint-Germain in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists Man United's set-piece struggles are his responsibility after Bournemouth defeat as new manager rushes to defence of assistant Carlos Fernandes
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ruben Amorim accepted responsibility for Manchester United's latest setback as they sank to defeat at home to Bournemouth on Sunday afternoon..

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho handed brutal reality check after Man Utd transfer request
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho found himself briefly out of the Manchester United side and a move away from Old Trafford may not be so easy with Barcelona turning down the possibility of signing him

arts.ttl: Papers: Rashford loses Man Utd dressing room after public comments
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Monday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: 'Cultural overhaul needed' | Neville slams mediocre Man Utd
arts.sum: Gary Neville has called for a "cultural overhaul" at Manchester United while also branding the squad as "mediocre" following the 3-0 defeat to Bournemouth at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Unplayable Osimhen sends misfiring Man Utd a message
arts.sum: When he has been fit, Osimhen has been simply unplayable and this form continued against Kayserispor on Sunday, with Galatasaray running out comfortable 5-1 victors. Man Utd lost 3-0 to Bournemouth at Old Trafford, but the Red Devils had their chances to score multiple goals.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth up to FIFTH after stunning win at Man Utd
arts.sum: Another disappointing performance at both ends of the pitch means United – who visit a Wolverhampton Wanderers side on Boxing Day fresh from a 3-0 win at Leicester City – will spend Christmas in the bottom half of the table for the first time since the 1989/90 season, when they were 12th. Chances were hard to come by in the opening stages as Amad tamely fired straight at Kepa Arrizabalaga, while Semenyo tested Andre Onana's handling from range at the other end.

arts.ttl: Neville: This Liverpool side remind me of the old Man Utd
arts.sum: Gary Neville likens Liverpool to the Manchester United team he played in after Arne Slot's side dominated scoring six at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth fans dream of Europe after humbling Man Utd
arts.sum: Bournemouth fans sing about European qualification after winning 3-0 at Manchester United for the second successive season.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: New favourite 'emerges' for Marcus Rashford after forward's latest snub
arts.sum: Al-Ahli reportedly as the favourites to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, with the attacker potentially leaving Old Trafford in January.
